title: Modernize Execution Handoff
description: Inter-orchestrator handoff contract for delegating a modernization roadmap phase from orchestrator-modernize to orchestrator-pipeline.

recipient_agent.description: The delegated orchestrator that owns execution/test/review flow.

working_project_dir.description: Target project directory (project B) where implementation should run. Worktree-aware runtimes should also treat this as the preferred delegated execution root/cwd.

source_project_dir.description: Optional source project directory (project A) for traceability.

pipeline_flags.description: Forwarded orchestrator-pipeline flags, already normalized by orchestrator-modernize.

context_paths.description: Paths to modernize artifacts used as planning constraints and execution context.

phase_id.description: Stable phase identifier from the modernization roadmap.

phase_index.description: 1-based phase index in the roadmap order, when available.

out_of_scope.description: Explicit exclusions and deferred items for this phase.

prerequisites.description: Dependencies or prerequisites required before this phase can complete.

dependencies.description: Alias/extension field for dependency lists used by some roadmaps.

exit_criteria.description: Phase completion criteria used by reviewer and orchestration gates.

acceptance_criteria.description: Optional alias/additional acceptance criteria if distinct from exit_criteria.

migration_constraints.description: Relevant rollback, compatibility, cutover, and data safety constraints for this phase.

phase_execution_contract.description: Resolved single-phase execution contract extracted from modernize roadmap and supporting docs.

modernize_constraints.description: Cross-cutting scope and behavior constraints from orchestrator-modernize.

definition_of_done.description: Delegated phase definition of done for orchestrator-pipeline.

evidence_expectations.description: Evidence/reporting expectations that should appear in the delegated final summary.

phase_sequence_context.description: Optional sequencing metadata for full-exec runs.

runtime_metadata.description: Optional runtime-specific metadata (trace IDs, timestamps, dispatcher info).
